description_long: This is a modern athletic sneaker featuring a predominantly white upper with gray and black overlays and accents. The shoe has a streamlined silhouette with a low-cut ankle collar, providing flexibility and support for urban activities. Lime green laces and a matching pull tab at the heel add a pop of color and visual interest. The midsole appears cushioned for comfort, while the outsole is dark gray with a textured pattern for traction. Subtle branding elements are present on the side, integrated into the design with a stylized logo. The interior is lined with black material, likely for added comfort and durability.
description: A white, gray, and black athletic sneaker with lime green laces and a cushioned sole, designed for comfort and urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the stylized logo, lime green laces, and the layered construction of the upper.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the heel pull tab, textured heel counter, and the layered heel design.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the logo, side overlays, and the overall streamlined profile.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the lime green laces, rounded toe box, and the shoe's symmetrical design.
attribute_logo: stylized geometric logo on the side in gray
